# MimmoBook

> Cloud-based reservation management for restaurants, venues, hotels and guesthouses. Multi-site support, branded booking pages, automated emails and real-time reporting.

MimmoBook is a multi-tenant SaaS platform that helps hospitality businesses manage online reservations across one or many sites. Each tenant gets a branded public booking page, automated guest emails, team roles and permissions, and real-time analytics.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Product overview, key features and pricing summary.
- [What is MimmoBook](/what-is-mimmobook): Plain-language introduction to the platform and who it serves.
- [Features](/features): Full list of capabilities including multi-site management, branded booking pages, automated emails, and reporting.
- [Use Cases](/use-cases): Examples for restaurants, event venues, hotels, guesthouses, catering and pop-ups.
- [Pricing](/pricing): Plans (Basic, Professional, Business), VAT-inclusive prices and free trial details.
- [Blog](/blog): Articles on hospitality reservations, multi-site operations and booking workflows.
- [About](/about): Company information and mission.
- [Support](/support): Help center and contact form.
- [Beta Guide](/beta-guide): Onboarding guide for beta tester accounts.
- [Sign up](/signup): Create a new tenant account and start a free trial.
- [Log in](/login): Sign in to an existing account.

## Optional

- [Privacy Policy](/privacy): GDPR and data protection terms.
- [Accessibility](/accessibility): Accessibility commitment and supported assistive technology.
